name: Wise Choice Summer Camp
neighborhood: Multiple: Coral Gables, Westchester, Doral, West Kendall, Homestead

description_short: Miami's trusted summer camp with 22+ years of experience at university campuses including UM and FIU. Swimming, field trips, and electives included.
description_long: Wise Choice Summer Camp has been serving Miami-Dade families for over 22 years, offering a comprehensive summer experience at five convenient locations including the University of Miami and Florida International University. The camp provides a balanced mix of structured activities and free play, with weekly swimming, field trips, and a variety of electives. Campers are grouped by age (5-14) to ensure age-appropriate programming. The camp emphasizes building self-confidence through fun learning experiences. Activities include art, chess, dance, fitness, music, STEM, video games, outdoor activities, and presentations. All locations offer a consistent high-quality experience with trained staff.
what_kids_do: Weekly field trips to local attractions
what_makes_unique: 22+ years serving Miami-Dade families. Multi-campus model at prestigious university locations (UM, FIU) plus community sites. Weekly swimming and field trips included in tuition with no hidden fees. Age-grouped programming for 5-14 year olds.

additional_fees: $100 deposit per week (applied to tuition, non-refundable)
pricing.scholarships_or_discounts: Early Bird Special advertised on website
pricing.raw_pricing_text: Camp tuition includes weekly field trips, weekly swimming, all activities, mini-electives, and camp supplies. There are no hidden fees for standard camp activities. A deposit of $100 per week selected is required at registration, along with a $79 non-refundable registration fee.

logistics.lunch_note: Optional lunch program through Our Lunches app (Roasters 'N Toasters). Families can also send lunch from home.
logistics.snacks_note: Snacks and drinks available for purchase at camp, $1-$2
logistics.transportation: Drop-off and pick-up at each location

raw_extracted_text: Discover why Wise Choice Summer Camp is rated one of the best summer camps in Miami. Serving Miami-Dade families for over 22 years. Locations: UM, FIU, Doral & West Kendall. Our summer camp is designed for children ages 5 to 14. We also accept children who are 4 at the start of camp if they turn 5 before August. Campers are grouped by age to ensure a fun, safe, and engaging experience for everyone. Camp tuition includes weekly field trips, weekly swimming, all activities, mini-electives, and camp supplies. There are no hidden fees for standard camp activities. A deposit of $100 per week selected is required at registration, along with a $79 non-refundable registration fee.

anything_missing: Specific weekly rates not extracted (prices page requires further scraping)
extraction_notes.anything_weird: Website uses custom CMS (not Wix). Very comprehensive site with detailed FAQ. Registration through Campium platform.
